title: polygala cristata
intro: Polygala cristata, also known as Running Polygala or Fairy Wings, is a perennial plant species belonging to the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala cristata include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce anxiety and stress, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
